news.title: 🇬🇧 british police have arrested two teenagers over an attempted arson attack on the kenton united sy
news.summary:
🇬🇧 british police have arrested two teenagers over an attempted arson attack on the kenton united synagogue in northwest london

a 17-year-old boy and a 19-year-old man were detained after a “firebomb”, a bottle containing accelerant, was thrown through a window into a medical room. the fire caused minor smoke damage, and no injuries were reported.

counter terrorism policing is investigating whETHer the suspects are linked to a group with ties to the iranian islamic regime.

the incident is part of a series of recent arson attacks targeting jewish sites in london. 

police also reported an attempted arson at a business linked to the jewish community on friday, and earlier arrests were made over another synagogue attack last week. 

in a separate incident last month, ambulances belonging to the volunteer emergency service hatzola were set on fire in golders green.

news.title:
코인shares: 암호화폐 funds see $1.4b weekly inflows, highest since january  

according to 코인shares, digit
news.summary:
코인shares: 암호화폐 funds see $1.4b weekly inflows, highest since january  

according to 코인shares, digital asset investment products recorded $1.4 billion in net inflows last week, marking the third consecutive week of inflows and the largest weekly inflow since january. total assets under management rose to $155 billion.  

비트코인 investment products led with $1.116 billion in inflows, bringing year-to-date inflows to $3.1 billion. 이더리움 products saw $328 million in inflows, the strongest weekly performance since january.

spark strategy lead: spark delisted rsETH in january, unaffected by recent security incident  

spar
news.summary:
spark strategy lead: spark delisted rsETH in january, unaffected by recent security incident  

spark delisted rsETH and other low-utilization assets in january and has continued to tighten its collateral scope and feature set. although this decision was unpopular among ETH looping users and likely caused spark to lose significant business and revenue to aave. however, sparklend still maintains ample ETH withdrawal liquidity under current conditions, while aave is already experiencing liquidity shortages in markets across multiple networks. nitter.net/monetsupply/status/204…

news.summary:

news.title:
layerzero: kelpdao loses ~$290m in exploit, attributed to dprk’s lazarus group

layerzero reported t
news.summary:
layerzero: kelpdao loses ~$290m in exploit, attributed to dprk’s lazarus group

layerzero reported that on april 18, 2026, kelpdao suffered an exploit resulting in losses of approximately $290m, preliminarily attributed to dprk’s lazarus group (tradertraitor). the attack poisoned downstream rpcs used by the dvn and, combined with ddos, forced failover, causing the dvn to validate transactions that never occurred, without exploiting protocol or key vulnerabilities. the incident stemmed from kelpdao’s 1/1 dvn setup, creating a single point of failure; impact was limited to rsETH with no broader contagion. affected rpcs have been replaced and the layerzero labs dvn is now operational.
nitter.net/layerzero_core/status/…

news.title:
협상 초안이래


sulaiman ahmed (@shaykhsulaiman)

ceasefire update: iran-u.s draft proposal

✅ iran agrees
news.summary:
협상 초안이래


sulaiman ahmed (@shaykhsulaiman)

ceasefire update: iran-u.s draft proposal

✅ iran agrees to a 15-year enrichment suspension, with the exception of research reactors for medical isotopes.

✅ iran’s stockpile of 60% and 20% uranium would be partially converted to reactor fuel, and partially ‘downblended’ to a lower enrichment level. however, it won’t leave iran.

✅ full iaea supervison on iran’s nuclear sites.

✅ opening the strait of hormuz, with the possibility of collecting tolls.

✅ the u.s. will offer iran phased 제재 relief

✅ the u.s. will unfreeze all iranian assets currently frozen abroad, amounting to $20 billion or more.

✅ the u.s. will commit to a non-aggression pact with iran that is ensured through a un national security council reSOLution and a treaty ratified by congress.

✅ the u.s. will withdraw all its military forces from the persian gulf.

source: amit segal israel channel 12







— https://nitter.net/shaykhsulaiman/status/2045943074040197137#m

🇺🇸🇮🇷🇵🇰 the ceasefire expires this week. vance is on his way to pakistan. iran is still deciding if it wants to talk.

- despite the public chaos, u.s. officials say both sides have quietly made progress since the april 12 talks
- the 2 core sticking points: enrichment duration (u.s. wants 20 years, iran offered 5) and the strait of hormuz
- iran attacked two indian vessels saturday, 트럼프 called it a "total violation of our ceasefire"
- islamabad went on security lockdown sunday night, 10,000 extra security forces being deployed
- 트럼프 threatened to destroy every power plant and bridge in iran if no deal is reached
- vance spent 21 hours negotiating last time and walked away empty-handed
- a second failure would be a major political blow for a vp widely seen as the 2028 frontrunner

source: nyt





— https://nitter.net/marionawfal/status/2046171977841361283#m

news.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 jd vance is flying back to pakistan for round 2 of talks, and the only thing getting off the gr
news.summary:
🇺🇸🇮🇷 jd vance is flying back to pakistan for round 2 of talks, and the only thing getting off the ground may be the planes themselves.

트럼프 has spent recent days insinuating iran agreed to all his demands, while iran forcefully denied such claims.

he’s again threatening to blow up power plants and bridges, if talks fail, and iran hasn’t even confirmed they’re showing up.

vance walked away from 21 hours of negotiations last time with nothing, his effort coming right after he flew to hungary to campaign for viktor orban, who went on to lose in a landslide.

the ceasefire expires this week and the sides still feel just so far apart.

for vance personally, the stakes couldn’t be higher. he’s the 2028 frontrunner and he owns this negotiation now.

another failure would be disastrous not only for the prospects of peace, but for vance’s prospects politically.

he needs this win. and so do all of us.

source: nyt










mario nawfal (@marionawfal)

- iran will not accept deadlines or ultimatums
- iran will not transfer its enriched uranium stockpiles

news.title:
the us wage growth gap is historically wide:

after-tax wages for higher-income households rose +5.6
news.summary:
the us wage growth gap is historically wide:

after-tax wages for higher-income households rose +5.6% yoy in march on a 3-month moving average basis, the highest in at least 3 years.

at the same time, lower-income earners saw their wages grow just+1.0% yoy, near the lowest in at least 3 years.

this marks the widest gap between the highest and lowest earners since data began in 2015.

by comparison, middle-income wages grew +2.0% yoy last month, near the lowest since mid-2024.

meanwhile, us cpi 인플레이션 jumped +3.3% yoy in march, meaning lower and middle-income households are seeing their real wages decline.

in other words, 인플레이션 is eating all of the wage gains for the bottom two-thirds of american households.

asset owners are the only winners.

news.title:
the global smartphone market is facing a historic decline:

global smartphone shipments are set to f
news.summary:
the global smartphone market is facing a historic decline:

global smartphone shipments are set to fall -13% yoy in 2026, or -160 million units, to ~1.1 billion, according to idc.

this marks a sharp drop from a +2% growth in 2025 and +6% in 2024.

the decline is being driven by an unprecedented memory chip shortage that is inflating component costs across the industry.

as a result, smartphone makers are discontinuing unprofitable entry-level models and pushing consumers toward higher-priced devices.

last year, ~170 million smartphones shipped for under $100, a segment currently uneconomical to maintain.

the shortage is expected to persist into mid-2027, and even when supply returns, memory prices are unlikely to fall back to 2025 levels.

the days of cheap smartphones are over.

news.title:
market liquidity is improving:

top of book depth in the S&P 500 futures jumped to $10.8 million in
news.summary:
market liquidity is improving:

top of book depth in the S&P 500 futures jumped to $10.8 million in the week ending tuesday, the highest since january.

this marks a +440% increase from the ~$2.0 million low recorded last month.

the current reading is also higher than 84.6% of all observations over the last 2 years.

by comparison, the peak over this period was ~$17.0 million, recorded during the market's 랠리 following president 트럼프's 2024 election victory.

etfs accounted for ~28% of total volume in the week ending tuesday, in-line with the historical average, after exceeding 40% for most of march.

falling etf trading volumes are typically associated with calmer markets and greater investor confidence in individual stock selection.

market conditions are stabilizing.

news.summary:
쐈대


오픈컨테이너 (@opencontainerkr)

미 해군 구축함 uss spruance는 아라비아해에서 이란 국적 화물선 touska를 차단하고 약 6시간 동안 반복적으로 정지 명령을 내렸습니다. 

선박이 이에 불응하자, 미 해군은 엔진룸을 비우도록 한 뒤 5인치 함포를 발사해 추진력을 무력화했습니다.

news.summary:
일본 지진 후 쓰나미 경보


visegrád 24 (@visegrad24)

🇯🇵 earthquakes have struck hokkaido, aomori, and iwate in japan, with a tsunami warning currently in effect. 

fishing vessels are evacuating offshore. 

a 7.4 magnitude quake occurred offshore at a depth of 10 km, with a tsunami warning of 3m for iwate and hokkaido.

news.title:

authorities are preparing the population for a mas
news.summary:
🇯🇵 moment of a magnitude 7.4 earthquake in japan

authorities are preparing the population for a mass evacuation due to ongoing seismic activity. prime minister sanae takaichi urged residents to remain 알림 in case of aftershocks.

the japanese island was struck by a strong earthquake measured at 7.4 magnitude. a tsunami warning has also been issued, with waves expected to reach up to 3 meters along the coastline.

news.title: ukraine has reportedly struck the tuapse refinery and the black sea port for the second time in four
news.summary:
ukraine has reportedly struck the tuapse refinery and the black sea port for the second time in four days

tuapse is one of russia’s key ports for oil exports on the black sea. the site also hosts an oil refinery owned by rosneft.

news.summary:
🇷🇺 in rostov-on-don, russia, a safety net collapsed during a circus performance, and a tiger jumped into the stands, causing panic among spectators.

there are no reports of casualties.
